response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Demonstrated open-source leadership and mentoring through workshops and projects
Proven experience in DevOps infrastructure and CI/CD setup
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed systems
Minimal exposure to technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering roles
